steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0033_plan_dsgc_morphology_channel_optimisation branch and worktree from main.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0002, t0019, t0022, t0024, t0026, t0027 dependencies completed; inspect their outputs that feed this plan.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure (assets/answer, data, code, plan, research, results, logs).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review downloaded paper corpus for methodology on compartmental-model parameter optimisation, CoreNEURON / GPU-NEURON, and surrogate modelling.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: researcher constraint — use only downloaded paper corpus, no internet search.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Read t0022 and t0024 code to enumerate channel mechanisms; read t0019 answer asset for top-10 VGCs; read arf/scripts/utils/vast_machines.py for Vast.ai tier filters.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the parameter-enumeration, search-space arithmetic, and Vast.ai cost-model methodology that the implementation step will execute.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: planning task, local CPU only, no remote machines required.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Enumerate morphology + top-10 VGC parameters, compute search-space sizes per strategy, extrapolate per-simulation wall-time from t0026 baselines, build Vast.ai cost tables, and write the answer asset.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines to tear down.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Identify alternative search strategies, surrogate variants, and cost-reduction tricks outside the three baseline paths.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md (parameter + cost tables, sensitivity), metrics.json (empty; no registered metrics), costs.json, remote_machines_used.json.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: task produces no experimental performance metric comparable to published results.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write suggestions.json with follow-up experiments motivated by the feasibility plan and cost envelope.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, finalise task.json, prepare PR, merge, overview refresh.
